# AI Context for @json-express/config-env

Provides `.env` file parsing for the JSONExpress IoC container.

## Setup
```typescript
import { ConfigEnv } from '@json-express/config-env';
kernel.registerConfigProvider(new ConfigEnv());
```

## AI Instruction
- Use this instead of `dotenv` directly.
- The kernel injects this provider into all plugins so they can resolve their secrets dynamically.
